body:
This fixes a bug in reflected radiation, which led to instances when
abs+refl > 1 (and hence ground absorbed radiation was negative).

It also avoids a division by 1-alpha_soil, which would lead to 1/0 when alpha_soil is zero, and clips alpha_soil > 0.


It also ensures reflected + absorbed + transmitted radiation is equal to 1.
title: Correct reflected and transmitted fractions
